title: PLP Redesign: Fulfillment Availability on Product Cards
description: Redesigned search and category page (PLP) product cards to surface real-time pickup availability and fulfillment type selection without requiring a product detail page visit. Introduced contextual in-store availability messaging, curbside pickup indicators, nearby store inventory callouts, and lazy-loaded fulfillment sections on each card — giving store-aware customers the information needed to make faster, more confident purchase decisions directly from browse pages.

title: PLP Redesign Phase 2: Get It Here Button & Store Labels
description: Extended the PLP redesign by adding a 'Get It Here' button directly on product cards, enabling customers to initiate in-store pickup from search and category pages without navigating to a product detail page. Standardized store name and label conventions across Cart and PDP for fulfillment consistency — reducing friction in the store-aware purchase path.

title: PDP: Unified Delivery + Ship-to-Home Experience
description: Combined the Delivery and Ship-to-Home purchase flows into a single unified button and selection model on product detail pages. Updated contextual delivery promo messaging, added free delivery callouts, and clarified the fulfillment selection UI to reduce decision friction — streamlining the path from PDP to checkout for delivery-eligible products.

title: FLO: Optimal Delivery Store Selection + Save for Later
description: Introduced intelligent same-day delivery store selection that evaluates local fulfillment locations and surfaces the fastest option based on customer location. Added Save for Later functionality allowing customers to hold items without losing cart state — reducing decision pressure and improving session continuity for high-consideration purchases.

title: Bundles & Kits: Kit Product Pages on Ace.com
description: Launched kit-specific product detail pages on ace.com with full visual browsing capability — image carousels for header and component SKUs, specifications, reviews, Q&A widgets, returns slide tray, and a new 'This Item Is Featured In' section for component SKUs. Delivered the complete customer-facing experience for Ace's new hardware kit product type.

title: BNPL Phase 1: PayPal & Apple Pay + Delivery UX Overhaul
description: Launched Buy Now Pay Later Phase 1, adding PayPal and Apple Pay express payment buttons to PLP, PDP, Cart, and Checkout on web and mobile app. Simultaneously shipped the full FLO delivery UX overhaul — introducing transparent delivery fee breakdowns across Cart, Checkout, and Confirmation, contextual delivery speed messaging in the store selection side tray, same-day delivery piloting at select locations, and a customer-paid per-mile fee display.

title: Social Proof, PDP Messaging & PLP Design Permanent
description: Enabled social proof signals across product pages to surface purchase confidence cues for site visitors. Updated PDP delivery messaging to surface ship-to-home and nearby availability in a unified, context-aware layout. Removed A/B testing scaffolding from the PLP redesign — making the updated product card design the permanent customer experience across all search and category pages.

title: PLP Filter Updates + Product Recommendations
description: Refined PLP filter taxonomy and display controls to help customers narrow search and category results more efficiently. Updated the product recommendations engine to surface more relevant suggestions to Google-originated traffic — improving top-of-funnel engagement for non-branded search visitors arriving directly at browse pages.

title: Riskified: BOGA Order Verification Fix
description: Closed a gap in Riskified fraud detection that allowed BOGA (Buy Online Get Another) split orders to bypass parent checkout verification — eliminating the most common vector for fulfillment fraud on promotional orders. Updated chargeback handling to correctly attribute BOGA split-order disputes, improving order success rate tracking and reducing fraud-related false declines at checkout.
